posts.author: ziad.ba (Ziad)
posts.cookedHtml:
Is there any way to created nested dropdown columns?

example one: “Select All” that selects all entries in the drop down (and then deselect the entries in the group not needed).

  • All
    • A
    • B
    • C
    • D
    • E
    • F

example two: Nesting groups of dropdown entries with the possibility to select the whole group (and then deselect the entries in the group not needed).

  • Tier 1
    • A
    • B
    • C
  • Tier 2
    • D
    • E
    • F

Feedback/Help would be much appreciated!

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml:
@ziad.ba

That’s a cool idea. But currently there is no way to do exactly that.

One idea you might consider would be to prefix your labels similar to this:

image502×590 13.7 KB

Once that is done, you can type the prefix and you will only see those labels:

image494×616 15 KB

Further, if you hold down the control key while selecting the desired labels, you will be able to select multiple labels at a time.
